description: sandals from catwalk created for the ethnic fashionista. Pair these with ethnic wear or with form fitting jeans and matching terracotta accessories.UpperSynthetic leather strap looping around the ankle with a tang closureSynthetic leather toe holder Textured footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with branded grooves and a floral lug at the heelSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
